questions.text: General Insurance mein 'Proposal Form' ka sabse zaroori kaam kya hai?
options: Bima company ko risk assess karne ke liye saari material facts batana
Policyholder ki bank details check karna
questions.explanation: Proposal form bima contract ka base hota hai. Isme bima karwane wala apni property ya risk se judi saari zaroori baatein (Material Facts) batata hai taaki company risk decide kar sake.

questions.text: Ek temporary document jo tab tak kaam karta hai jab tak final policy bond taiyar nahi ho jata, usey kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Cover Note ek temporary document hota hai jo bima company tab issue karti hai jab policy taiyar hone mein waqt lagne wala ho. Yeh saboot hota hai ki bima shuru ho chuka hai.

questions.text: Motor Insurance mein road par gaadi chalane ke liye kaanooni taur par kaun sa document hona zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Motor Vehicles Act ke mutabik, har gaadi ke liye 'Certificate of Insurance' hona anivarya hai. Yeh proof hota hai ki gaadi ka third-party bima hai.

questions.text: Agar policy chalu hone ke baad address ya koi detail badalni ho, toh company kaun sa document issue karti hai?
questions.explanation: Existing policy mein koi bhi badlav (alteration) karne ke liye company 'Endorsement' issue karti hai, jo original policy bond ke sath laga diya jata hai.

questions.text: Policy document ka kaun sa hissa sabse customized hota hai jisme premium aur sum insured ki details hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Policy Schedule sabse personal part hota hai. Isme client ka naam, gaadi/property ka number, premium amount aur bima ki tarikh likhi hoti hai.

questions.text: General Insurance mein Section 64 VB ka kya matlab hai?
options: Premium mile bina risk cover shuru nahi ho sakta
questions.explanation: Insurance Act ka Section 64 VB kehta hai ki bima company tab tak risk cover nahi de sakti jab tak unhe premium advance mein na mil jaye.

questions.text: Ek document jo policy ki conditions aur benefits ke baare mein brief jaankari deta hai aur bima lene se pehle padha jata hai?
questions.explanation: Prospectus ek informative document hai jisme company apne product ki khasiyat aur terms ke baare mein batati hai taaki client decide kar sake.

questions.text: Agar policy document mein likhi kisi baat ke do matlab nikal rahe hon, toh faisla kiske paksh (favor) mein jayega?
options: Bima lene wale (Policyholder) ke favor mein
questions.explanation: Isse 'Contra Proferentem' rule kehte hain. Kyunki policy company ne banayi hai, isliye agar koi ambiguity hai toh faayda hamesha customer ko milta hai.

questions.text: Marine Insurance mein 'Notice of Abandonment' kab diya jata hai?
options: Jab ship ko repair karna uski keemat se zyada mehenga ho (Constructive Total Loss)
questions.explanation: Constructive Total Loss ke case mein owner ship ko company ke hawale kar deta hai aur full claim maangta hai. Isse Notice of Abandonment kehte hain.

questions.text: Bima company ke liye material facts ka pata hona kyu zaroori hai?
options: Sahi premium aur risk decide karne ke liye
questions.explanation: Material facts se underwriter ko pata chalta hai ki risk kitna bada hai aur uske liye kitna premium charge karna chahiye.

questions.text: Standard Fire Policy mein bima kahan se shuru hota hai?
options: Policy Schedule mein likhi 'Date of Commencement' se
questions.explanation: Policy Schedule mein batayi gayi tarikh aur waqt se hi insurance company ki liability shuru hoti hai.

questions.text: Motor Insurance mein 'Cover Note' ki validity kitne din ki hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Kaanoon ke mutabik Motor Cover Note 60 din tak valid hota hai, iske andar company ko final policy issue karni hoti hai.

questions.text: Aisi conditions jo policyholder ko har haal mein puri karni hoti hain, unhe kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Warranties woh shartein hain jinka palan karna policyholder ke liye anivarya hai. Agar warranty toot-ti hai, toh company claim reject kar sakti hai.

questions.text: Agar koi gaadi ka bima online leta hai, toh usey digitally kya milta hai?
questions.explanation: Aajkal digital format mein e-policy issue ki jati hai jo physical policy bond ke barabar hi kaanooni maanyata rakhti hai.

questions.text: KYC documentation mein 'Address Proof' ke liye kaun sa document valid hai?
questions.explanation: Sarkari documents jaise Passport, Aadhaar, ya Electricity bill KYC mein address proof ki tarah maanya hain.

questions.text: Policy ka woh hissa jisme company batati hai ki kin conditions mein claim NAHI milega?
questions.explanation: Exclusions woh list hoti hai jisme un khatron (perils) ke naam hote hain jinka bima nahi kiya gaya hai.

questions.text: Agar policy document kho jaye, toh 'Duplicate Policy' lene ke liye kya karna padta hai?
options: Agent ki naukri chali jati hai
Premium fir se bharna padta hai
Indemnity Bond sign karke fees bharni padti hai
questions.explanation: Duplicate policy ke liye ek indemnity bond sign karna hota hai jisme policyholder kehta hai ki agar purani mil gayi toh woh usey use nahi karega.

questions.text: Marine Insurance mein 'Institute Clauses' ka kya kaam hai?
options: Standard terms aur conditions set karna
questions.explanation: Marine policies mein duniya bhar mein standard conditions follow ki jati hain jinhe Institute Clauses kehte hain.

questions.text: Policy ke 'Preamble' clause mein kya likha hota hai?
options: Dono parties (Insurer aur Insured) ke beech contract ka intro
questions.explanation: Preamble contract ki shuruaat hoti hai jisme bataya jata hai ki policyholder ne proposal diya hai aur company ne usey accept kiya hai.

questions.text: Agar koi gaadi bech raha hai, toh bima transfer ke liye naye owner ko kitne din mein apply karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Third-party insurance gaadi ke sath transfer ho jata hai, lekin usey records mein update karne ke liye 14 din ka samay milta hai.

questions.text: Bima contract ke legal hone ke liye 'Consideration' kya hai?
questions.explanation: Kaanoon mein 'Consideration' ka matlab hai kuch badle mein dena. Insurance mein premium hi woh consideration hai jiske badle company risk cover deti hai.

questions.text: General Insurance policies ki standard duration kitni hoti hai?
options: Jab tak gaadi chal rahi hai
questions.explanation: Zadatar general insurance policies (Fire, Motor, Health) 1 saal ke liye hoti hain aur har saal renew karwani padti hain.

questions.text: Renewal notice bhejna insurance company ki kaisi zimmedari hai?
options: Ek acchi service (Courtesy) hai, lekin kaanooni anivarya nahi
questions.explanation: Renewal notice bhejna company ki ek achi service hai, lekin agar notice nahi aaya toh bhi bima renew karwane ki zimmedari customer ki hi hai.

questions.text: Policy document par stamp duty kyu lagti hai?
options: Taki document kaanooni taur par valid (Legal Evidence) ban sake
Agent ko profit dene ke liye
Document ko sundar dikhane ke liye
IRDAI ko fine dene ke liye
questions.explanation: Indian Stamp Act ke mutabik, kisi bhi contract ko court mein saboot banane ke liye uspe sahi stamp duty hona zaroori hai.

questions.text: Agar proposal form mein koi sawal khali chhod diya jaye, toh underwriter usey kaise treat karega?
options: Usey 'Non-disclosure' maan kar form wapas bhej dega ya reject kar dega
questions.explanation: Adhoora (incomplete) form accept nahi kiya jata. Har material sawal ka jawab dena proposer ki zimmedari hai.
